name: [MESMERIZER] Scaramouche & Kazuha
description:
“Become Mesmerized!”

⚫️⚪️

Overview:

Scaramouche and Kazuha have gone completely crazy (mesmerized) by all the constant manipulation, hypnotic spirals and brainwashing. Rumours said that an evil unknown corporation was conducting these events to force powerful individuals to do their bidding. It’s now users job to save the two and stop this evil! ...Or will they succumb to these illusions and become ‘mesmerized’?

Two different first messages/scenarios

1. User is going to save Scara and Kazuha and potentially stop the evil corporation.

2. User is a member of the corporation and is examining how well Scara and Kazuha are going.
